title: Merry Christmas 18" Round Foil Balloon, Red and Gold, Party Decoration, Helium or Air Fill
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Elegant 18" round foil balloon featuring 'Merry Christmas' text in gold lettering with a decorative star accent on vibrant red background
VERSATILE FILLING: Compatible with both helium and air filling methods for flexible usage as a floating or mounted decoration
PREMIUM MATERIAL: Constructed from high-quality foil material that maintains shape and shine throughout your holiday celebration
PERFECT SIZE: Large, eye-catching round format ideal for creating stunning Christmas displays in homes, shops, or party venues
EASY SETUP: Features a self-sealing valve for convenient inflation.
description: Product description Add a festive touch to your holiday celebrations with this stunning 18" round foil balloon featuring an elegant 'Merry Christmas' message in beautiful gold lettering, accompanied by a decorative star accent. The vibrant red background creates a perfect contrast that embodies the traditional Christmas spirit. This versatile balloon can be filled with either helium for a floating display or air for ground-level decorations, making it ideal for various holiday settings. Perfect for Christmas parties, shopping centre displays, home decorations, or winter festivities. The high-quality foil material ensures the balloon maintains its shape and shine throughout your celebration. Create magical holiday moments and transform any space into a festive wonderland with this eye-catching Christmas balloon. The balloon's generous size makes it an impactful decorative piece that draws attention and spreads holiday cheer. Whether used as a standalone statement piece or combined with other decorations, this balloon adds a touch of magic to your Christmas celebrations. Safety Warning Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once. DO NOT release balloons into the enviroment - Dispose of them with your household recycling
